name: You're Just Not Her
overview: A story of lovers Lin Xin and Xia Li who have been living together for a long time. Their love gradually becomes dull and they also have differences about the future. After the two experienced a car accident, the down-to-earth and virtuous Charlie became enthusiastic and straightforward, transforming into the romantic lover that men dream of. However, she seemed to be a completely different person in front of her. What happened in the car accident?

trailers.title: TVB Drama | You're Just Not Her | Trailer | KH DUB | #TVBCambodiaDrama
